title: Senior Software Engineer - Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates!
